# NOVA-7 Endless Void

> Free browser asteroid shooter — no download, no account, no install. Play at https://yoursite.com/nova7

NOVA-7 Endless Void is a single-file, self-contained browser arcade game built in vanilla HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript. One pilot, one life, infinite procedural sectors. The game escalates continuously: asteroid density, speed, armor, boss HP, and attack patterns all scale with sector depth. There is no win condition. The void never ends.

## How to Play

- **Controls:** Arrow keys or WASD to move, Space to fire, R to restart after death
- **Mobile:** Drag to move, tap to fire, tap the TRANSWARP button to activate drive
- **Objective:** Survive as long as possible, kill bosses to advance sectors, post the highest score
- **Scoring:** 100 pts per asteroid destroyed, multiplied by combo chain (up to 5×)
- **One-hit death:** A single unshielded asteroid strike ends the run

## Core Mechanics

**Milestones (repeat each sector):**
- 0 pts — Asteroid storm begins
- 2,000 pts — Density surge (asteroid count doubles temporarily)
- 3,000 pts — Hardened cores activate (sector 3+): asteroids require 2 hits
- 4,000 pts — Space Warp Event: cannon doubles in damage for the warp phase; after warp resolves, Chrome Power activates (permanent double damage that sector)
- 5,000 pts — Derelict Vessel I drifts across the field: shoot it for +1 shield hit
- 6,000 pts — ECHO-1 wingmate spawns: AI partner with 50 HP, auto-targets asteroids
- 7,000 pts — Derelict Vessel II: shoot for +2 shield hits
- 8,000 pts — Enemy Rocket spawns top-right: 10 HP, actively targets ECHO-1; destroy it to earn +3 shield hits and unlock Laser Cannons (50 damage/hit)
- 9,000 pts — Derelict Vessel III: shoot for +4 shield hits
- 10,000 pts — Sector Boss drops in

**Combo System:**
- Chain asteroid kills without missing to build combo multiplier
- 3 kills = 2×, 6 kills = 3×, 10 kills = 4×, 20+ kills = 5×
- Missing a shot or taking damage resets the chain

**Shield Economy:**
- Shields absorb one hit each; without shields, any hit ends the run
- Sources: Derelict Vessel I (1 hit), II (2 hits), III (4 hits), Enemy Rocket drop (3 hits), Shield Boost upgrade (+3 hits)
- Shield Regen upgrade slowly regenerates shields over time

**Transwarp Drive:**
- Each boss kill earns 1 Transwarp charge
- Activating skips 10 sectors at once (jump from sector 1 to sector 11, etc.)
- Useful for speedrunning high sector numbers

## The 12 Named Boss Dreadnoughts

Bosses spawn at 10,000 pts per sector. Each has unique HP, color, attack patterns, and a Phase 2 that activates at 50% HP. Bosses are assigned in order, repeating after sector 12 with the suffix MK-N (e.g., GOLIATH MK-13 in sector 13).

| # | Name | Archetype | Primary Color |
|---|------|-----------|---------------|
| 1 | GOLIATH | DREADNOUGHT | Orange (#ff6600) |
| 2 | XERATH | HIVE_MIND | Green (#00ff88) |
| 3 | VOIDMAW | CRYSTAL_GOLEM | Purple (#aa44ff) |
| 4 | CORRUPTUS | PLAGUE_CARRIER | Red (#ff2244) |
| 5 | SPECTERION | PHANTOM_LEVIATHAN | Cyan (#00ccff) |
| 6 | IRONCLAD | IRON_BEHEMOTH | Gold (#ffcc00) |
| 7 | GAZER-PRIME | VOID_EYE | Magenta (#ff00aa) |
| 8 | QUEEN VESPA | SWARM_QUEEN | Teal (#44ffaa) |
| 9 | MYCOTHRIX | FUNGAL_TITAN | Orange (#ff6600, cycles) |
| 10 | PRISMACH | PRISM_OVERLORD | Green (#00ff88, cycles) |
| 11 | REAPER-IX | NECRO_WARSHIP | Purple (#aa44ff, cycles) |
| 12 | CHRONOVORE | CHRONO_BEAST | Red (#ff2244, cycles) |

**Boss HP scaling:** `HP = round((80 + sector × 20) × 1.3^(sector−1))`. Sector 1 (GOLIATH) has 500 HP as a fixed exception.

**Boss attack patterns** (assigned by archetype index, up to 4 simultaneous in deep sectors):
- `dual_spread` — two angled bullet fans
- `triple_burst` — three-shot burst fire
- `spiral` — rotating spiral volley
- `aimed_volley` — targeted shots at player position
- `fan_shot` — wide fan spray
- `random_burst` — random scatter
- `tracking` — homing projectiles
- `mine_drop` — stationary mines placed across the field

**Boss movement styles** (cycle every 5 sectors): `sine_h`, `zigzag`, `circle`, `dive_bomb`, `figure8`

## 9 Ship Upgrades

Upgrades are offered after each boss kill. Two random eligible upgrades are presented. Stackable upgrades can be taken up to 3 times.

| Upgrade | Effect | Stackable |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| RAPID FIRE | Fire rate +25% per stack | Yes (×3) |
| ARMOR PIERCE | Bullet damage +50% per stack | Yes (×3) |
| AFTERBURNER | Ship speed +20% per stack | Yes (×3) |
| TRIPLE CANNON | Fire 3 bullets simultaneously | No |
| HOMING ROUNDS | Bullets track nearest enemy | No |
| SHIELD REGEN | Shields slowly regenerate over time | No |
| REAR TURRET | Auto-fires backward continuously | No |
| BURST MODE | Each trigger fires 3 bullets in burst | No |
| SHIELD BOOST | +3 shield hits immediately | Yes (always available) |

Upgrade menus appear at score thresholds: 6,000 · 18,000 · 30,000 · 42,000 · 54,000 · 66,000 · 78,000 · 90,000 · 102,000 · 114,000 pts.

## 8 Procedural Sector Themes

Sectors cycle through 8 environments, each with a distinct color palette and hazard type:

| Sector # (mod 8) | Name | Hazard Type |
|-----------------|------|-------------|
| 1 | VOID SECTOR | none |
| 2 | CRIMSON NEBULA | pulsar (area damage fields) |
| 3 | GREEN RIFT | mine (stationary explosive mines) |
| 4 | CRYSTAL EXPANSE | anomaly (gravity fields warp bullets) |
| 5 | IRON GRAVEYARD | debris (tumbling derelict hulks) |
| 6 | VOID PLAGUE | spore (organic spore clouds) |
| 7 | PHANTOM RIFT | phantom (invisible threats materialize mid-dodge) |
| 8 | STORM SECTOR | storm (intensified asteroid storm) |

**Difficulty scaling per sector:**
- Asteroid speed: `0.7 + min(sector × 0.15, 2.5) × 0.25`
- Asteroid size: `7 + sector × 0.8` px radius
- Spawn rate: `max(16, 60 − sector × 3)` frames between spawns
- Hardened cores: active from sector 3 onward
- Double spawn waves: active from sector 5 onward (every 3rd sector)
- Enemy bullet speed: `2.2 + min(sector × 0.15, 2.5) × 0.3`

## ECHO-1 Wingmate

ECHO-1 is an AI companion that joins at 6,000 points each sector.
- 50 HP; takes damage from enemy bullets and the enemy rocket
- Auto-targets and destroys asteroids independently
- Positioned to cover player flanks
- If destroyed, player continues alone for the remainder of the sector
- Does not carry over between sectors (respawns at 6,000 pts each new sector)

## Leaderboard

Top 5 scores are stored in `sessionStorage` under key `nova7_scores`. Each entry records: score, sector reached, and total asteroid kills. The leaderboard is displayed on the title screen and the death screen.

## Technical Notes

- **Platform:** Single HTML file, vanilla JS + HTML5 Canvas, no external dependencies except Google Fonts (Orbitron, Share Tech Mono)
- **Canvas size:** 400 × 600 px game canvas; responsive fullscreen supported
- **Starfield:** Separate background canvas (`#starfield`) with 220 animated stars
- **Frame rate:** `requestAnimationFrame` loop; starfield updates every other frame for performance
- **Persistence:** Session storage only (scores reset on tab close)
- **Mobile:** Full touch support — drag to move, tap to fire, touch the TRANSWARP button

## Sector Dossier Intel (unlocked by reaching prior sector)

- Sector 2: Crystal anomalies warp bullets — aim ahead of targets
- Sector 3: Hardened asteroid cores — plasma rounds only
- Sector 4: IRONCLAD MK-4 uses dive-bomb attacks at 50% HP
- Sector 5: Organic spore clouds chain-detonate — use it
- Sector 6+: Bosses gain new attack patterns every 2 sectors
